title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

plan.objective: Verify that src/store/graph.ts correctly imports mkdirSync via static top-level import from fs and that save() is a plain synchronous function with no await expressions. Ensure all build, test, and lint gates pass.
key_changes: Verification task - no code changes required
Confirm static import of mkdirSync from fs module
Confirm save() function is synchronous with no await
Verify save() is exported for test access
Run all gates: build, test, lint to ensure they pass
Document verification findings in PLAN.md
